sections.content: UP changed bbox [2, 39, 22, 63] which includes the right edge timer bar. Let me check what changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after UP
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

ascii_before = before.ascii.split('\n')
ascii_after = after.ascii.split('\n')

print("Top area diff:")
for i in range(17, 24):
    b = ascii_before[i][10:45]
    a = ascii_after[i][10:45]
    if b != a:
        print(f"  Row {i}: BEFORE: {b}")
        print(f"           AFTER:  {a}")

print("\nRight edge diff (cols 60-63):")
for i in range(0, 10):
    b = ascii_before[i][60:64]
    a = ascii_after[i][60:64]
    if b != a:
        print(f"  Row {i}: {b} -> {a}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
UP changed the blue/sky blue blocks at the right end. The pattern changed from `SSbb` to `bbbb` on rows 19-20, and from `SSbb` to `SSSS` on rows 21-22. So UP/DOWN seem to change the vertical arrangement of the blue blocks.
Let me also note the timer bar changed - row 2-3 went from NN to WW.
Let me try DOWN to reverse this.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try DOWN to reverse UP
action(['DOWN'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
